# Barisuka Turakpe

> Nigerian software engineer and founder building financial infrastructure for Africa's digital economy — payments, products, and distribution.

This is the personal website of **Barisuka Turakpe**. The site is a single-page profile with biography, current ventures, and contact links. For factual questions about who he is, what he builds, or how to reach him, start with the homepage.

**Focus areas:** fintech, cross-border payments, product management, software engineering, marketing and distribution.

**Education:** Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA), Lovely Professional University, India.

**Certifications:** Aha! Product Management Professional Certificate; Atlassian Agile Project Management Professional Certificate.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://barisuka.com/): Full biography, ventures, side projects, and contact links.

## Ventures

- [Remotah](https://remotah.com/): Connects skilled African professionals with employers in the US, UK, and Canada; handles cross-border payments.
- [Atisah](https://atisah.com/): Storefront and cross-border payouts for African creators selling digital products worldwide.
- [AI Webkits](https://www.aiwebkits.com/): Free online tools for text, code, SEO, and more.
